entries.content:
It’s been rough lately. Like, I don’t really know… I felt like I overcame the breakdown I had recently, but it seems like not. I’m not feeling sad or depressed, but like… empty? Like I cannot stop thinking about… well… loneliness. Like it feels like I’m missing something… someone in my life. The more I think, the more… the worse I feel. Like I don’t really know how to explain it.
At this point, I just want someone in my life, but… I know, or I keep saying to myself—that in this state, a relationship is not a good idea. I don’t want to depend on someone with my mental health… I just cannot. But I want to… something brought out the feeling of love, or being wanted again, and I feel like I’ve gotten addicted to it.
Like on the ski trip with school… the warm and gentle snuggle we had made me yet again realize what I want in a relationship… and it kinda got me where I am.
The feeling of being wanted… it is overwhelming. I just want more and more. I do believe it is due to me being so touch-starved… like, now I just want to be held and let it all out. Vent to someone understanding of my feelings. I do think the touch starvation started when I cut my ties with Niky... the warm, gentle, yet-warm hugs she gave me from time to time… I miss them so fucking much.
Now… just let me hold someone… please…
It has been close to one year without ANY female interaction. First, it REALLY felt like shit… then I kinda got used to it… then… an angel came. Viky… just her voice… her smile… her eyes… lit up the dark place I was in. Then… I fucked it up. Again. But it didn’t feel like much cause we’ve never even gotten close in a physical way… so I didn’t really mind. Just now I realize what a loss she was to me. Someone I could be there for… someone I could talk to for hours at a time… someone who I LOVE.
Now the emptiness hits. After the ski trip… I’ve felt… weird… like the touch starvation became more and more apparent. After being “cuddled” (if you can call it that), I felt wanted again… I felt loved again… like someone cared about me again. After I vented to Mates, I felt better… a little… and got to the point of not caring that much again. But then I realized… the girl who tried to, I don’t know, get with Mates? Hook up with him...? After 2 WEEKS of breaking up with someone she had been with for over a whole year shared a story with another guy. Like… is it worth it?
Is it worth getting a girlfriend when there’s a possibility of her not really loving me?
And now to top it all off… the weekend. I kinda opened up to Mates… not trauma dumping or anything, but just kind of venting. Thanking him for help, ensuring him he’ll be okay. The feeling of being there came back… even more. The gentle head pats I gave him and the gentle back scratch he gave me… just… they hit the spot. Like… it has been all I really want.
That mutual feeling… of caring about each other. Like… it now feels like a drug… a drug I cannot get enough of. It has been just TWO DAYS and I miss it. I miss the feeling… feeling of being someone’s first… not even first… like being someone they can turn to… and like… I feel like I have no one like this.
I feel like… Matej is busy with graduation… Jakub will laugh at me… and I don’t really want to bother Mates. I just feel bad. I don’t know…
I do want to suppress the feeling… but… how? Alcohol? No… drinking alone is for losers. Nicotine? Too expensive. Self-harm? If anyone noticed I’d be done, and I feel scared. Suicide… I want to live and give life a second chance. And worse… I’ve really thought about it. Truly did. The letter… the way… the place… the funeral… the effect it’d have on people. I did think it through. Spent a few nights crying… crying myself to sleep… with thoughts like, if I died who’d miss me… with visions of my mother crying rivers because of my passing… It made me all emotional. It made me cry bad.
I cried after 3 years… 3 whole years of suppressing emotions. 3 years of self-sabotage… 3 years of misery… years of pure cope… 3 years of failed attempts to find myself again. Now who am I? Who is the person that is hiding under this mask? Who?
I don’t really know anymore. I just think it is a sort of void… a place where nothing can exist… everything that can exist is just pure, refined cope… beliefs… lies. I got lost… caught up in my own lies. Lies about how I feel, what I believe, what I think… who I like, what I think… just a mess. A mess that I want to clean up.
How? I don’t know… where I’ll start, and where I’ll end up… 6ft under… in a grave…
Peace… all I really want… peace. Peace in my head… just a little… so the inner monologue stays quiet. That is all I really want. For it to shut up. It is chaos inside… I cannot think straight… keep fighting for the last word…
It… it… it is just draining. Draining my energy… sanity… and mostly life in general. The only thing keeping me up is… tiering. How it is like… I wake up, drink 300ml of coffee and still tiered… even though I try to sleep, I cannot. Just can’t. Last night, when I started writing this, got in bed at 10pm, and the inner monologue just couldn’t stop. Went for the tablet at 11pm… and was writing till like midnight. And I mean… it got more quiet… but wasn’t shut. From time to time, thoughts still went left and right.
Luckily, no thoughts about harming myself or others, but a few about the past… about people I’ve liked… people I’ve loved. Now it is… weird… still, my mind keeps spitting out some distractions and keeps fighting to be on top.
For how long? I don’t really know… when I come home, I don’t know if I’ll have enough energy to feed the mind… it may just give in… again…
If I try to stay awake, I’ll probably won’t have enough energy or willpower to distract myself… if I try to sleep… I’ll be focusing on shutting the body down and still not distracting myself.
What can I really do…? Probably really, nothing… if I somehow manage to pull a huge-ass crash of caffeine I may just sleep… keeping the mind clear without negative thoughts will be the difficult part… more like impossible.
I really don’t have anything I can really do now. If I stay awake… I’ll have to pull through… don’t really know how. If I try to sleep… I’ll probably wake up crying… but still I feel like there is hope…
Like 68+1 said in one of her songs: “Some day, the storm will clear and I'll find myself standing strong I’ll be washed by the rain and ready to start a new life.” Or something like that. I truly do believe it will be.

entries.title: "Thanks"
entries.content:
I just truly wanna say… thank you… to everyone I’ve known in the past, I know now, and I’ll know in the future… just thank you. Especially now.
How do I feel? I want to say… quite good actually. I feel like I was reborn yesterday. I really don’t know what happened though… it’s almost like something or someone lifted some sort of curse off of me.
I do feel… light… like the light at the end of the tunnel approached and finally came. And I got to it. It may have been because of some sort of realization… or maybe because there were some wise words that Rem said in episode 18 or something… the speech genuinely made me cry. (- was rewatching Re:Zero with Mates)
Not tears of sadness or pain… but genuine tears of joy. It was like she spoke to me. Again. But now… it was different. It felt like… she was giving me HOPE. Genuine HOPE.
And now… I just really don’t want to go. The thoughts of this beautiful world are back… the thoughts that made me curse… thoughts like “this world is a disaster,” “this world has no LOVE” or “this world is not for me” are gone. Finally…
The time has come—for me—to finally stand up. Look everyone in the eyes… and be happy. The time where I don’t need to force myself to smile. The time where I genuinely feel ALIVE.
I just want to say… thank you, Mates… for hearing me out… for giving me the feeling of being wanted in this world. Thank you… thank you for letting me rest my head on your shoulder… thank you, for… just… being here… for me. 
 THANK YOU

entries.title: Relapse
entries.content:
15.7.2025

I don't know why I am feeling like this again yet... It is not really the same.. before I felt suicidal and now I just feel numb.... It is always after meeting up with Mates.... Always for some reason each time I enjoy my time more and more since when I'm with him my mind feels crystal clear like his presence always un-lifts some sort of a curse... I don't know why... but now all alone I feel... empty... It is like I really do miss him... even tho I do not feel like I could ever like... love him... It still hurts... 
I don't question my sexuality cuz it is like a bro thing but it is like he always gives me the attention I so crave but I never can get enough of it. like for example.... When we eep we do cuddle....I like it since it solves my hunger for physical contact and fulfills my touch starvation to a certain degree. but it is always like he rolls over lays on my chest and I just scratch his scalp and pull him even closer... or it is the other way around where I lag on his arm etc... 
like now I feel like it is such a dual edged sword... at the moment I feel so secure... calm... and... well... loved... not like romantically but loved... like a friend... that means too much for me.... and it is so confusing.... even for me... like I cannot see myself without his attention. like to a point that even a reaction on a message can make my day 10x better... I just feel overwhelmed... I feel like I've been through a lot lately... and my mental took a hit again...
Now what gives me the most trouble is sleeping like I cannot fall asleep... to some point it feels like early stages of insomnia. It usually goes like I go to bed and I just keep thinking about myself: "what am I doing wrong...", "where is the issue at" etc. and I just wonder... what is going to happen to me if this continues... like I do not want it to go, as far as it went last time... 
cuz now I feel like I would keep it to myself and if it went that far again... and if he didn't notice... I just don't want for it to happen again and rely on him to save me... again...
I don't want him to carry my issues on his shoulders... yet I feel like if I don't tas to solve it , might collapse like I did not that long ago... It feels like I'm draining everyone around me and not giving back to them enough... it feels terrible and I feel so selfish... like I just don't want to bother people around me anymore..

entries.title: Spotlight
entries.content:
Here we go again.. Yet again at 5AM Not being able to sleep... it is the same but different again... like I just finished "citrus" anime and there was something that I could relate... 
the consequences of ones "fooling around" like I know that it wont go and as Here but like I feel the same way as Yuzu... the fact that I was never in real relationship makes me so venerable to this like I just feel so addicted... I just want it... more... and more... like I just want my 'lust' to be fulfilled.... just for a moment and I do not want to fight this stupid butte all and play these games... it is always like this... one of us plays hard to get and then it ends up like always... it spirals into this 
always me being the one that chase and he has no issue with being alone cuz he has so many opportunities to just pull... he knows how to talk,... yap... be funny... or in general is not aware of to stuff that I am cuz he just does not care... while me being here stressing over a person that I can provide nothing for... 
like...~why... why am I like this. ~ Just for a moment if he.... no... any one noticed... just please set again there we go it is 5 AM and lim listening to music that is louder than it  should just so I don't hear the disgusting voice of mine... just please.---anyone.- - don't want to go back.- just if I could trust someone again and why does it HAVE BE HIM.~ why... just... why... after the incidents. ~that I had I just lost the ability to trust anyone... just now..- one exception... and it is miserable... just why... I don't know why all of this is happening... If I could just run away... and never come back.... here... to this misery it is driving me insane... it is an endless cycle of emotions... that I naturally suppress... and that just emerge out of nowhere... just why, why it had to be me.. and now I'm at the point that I don't want or even cannot call for help... or not the people I know... cuz they don't really know me... or just turn a blind ese.- I might as well just this one last time...

entries.title: Endless Loop
entries.content: I don't know how or why but the feelings I had few weeks ago are not really gone. it is like they make themself more "hidden" if I can say it like that but really no... at day I just sort of forget about them but at night it is a different story... when it is quiet... they appear. like a curse that feeds of darkness sort of. like I don't have suicidal thoughts anymore which it good but at the same time new thoughts are introduced. like something telling me that I'm not good enough for anyone I have in my life. like I'm gonna loose them. ALL. Like Matěj is gonna forget about me cuz I wont meet his expectations in the long run. Mates is gonna leave me like I did leave his friend group... by just distancing himself more and more and one day just try to forget me... why?  I don't know... I just have a feeling like why would he stay around. What can I offer him? More then mid food that is nothing special, terrible sleep with me? and just draining him by my troubles and feelings? Like I really apreciace him... more than I should. He just was there for me at the right times to the point he has became my "safe place" but it is a curse at the same time... like whenever I have these feeling down moments I'd love to go  to him and just speak my heart out. and eventually fall asleep in his arms. bit I feel like I'm being too clingy for spending two days with him and bothering him a week after. like I just fear I'll be too much of a burden so I decide to drown myself in my emotions and thoughts to not risk loosing another VERY important person in my life. Like I know why i distance myself from people now... I just fear that I'll loose them... like I did loose most of people in my life. Niky, Vik, and few ppl form my school I just was too much. not really my self in front of them. just an image of what I wanted them to think of me. and what did it end like? well all of them gone. I just feel like I could've done so much more but well... not really now anymore. Just like I don't really know what to do when it comes to meeting new people. Whenever I meet someone new I just am instantly aware of ANYTHING they are doing. and most of all I just cannot blindly trust anyone anymore. just from being rated out by my so called friends to my very own brother spreading gossip about me to my friends is just too much for me to handle right now. it is really an endless loop of emotions and thoughts. like being permanently worried of people leaving, I just feel like I'm not enough at all. What do I do really? yes I work out from time to time, I ride my bike, and most of the time I just rot into despair and hopelessness. the only thing that I really do is just whole bunch of nothing and to top it off I'm the fakest person to be ever seen. only TWO people know me as me and only ONE knows of the shit I'm writing right fucking now. anyone else that knew me knew a different and mostly FAKE person that never existed. Like why is it? I keep asking myself over and over again. it is the question that keeps me awake. I just cannot find the right explanation. is it due to me having such little ego left? is it due to me being afraid of looking weak in front of others? is it due to me protecting myself in some sort? I don't know... and would like to know... it is just so draining at this point... like all I really want is someone I can turn to at all times and not be afraid to loose them and them to not judge me for who I really am. but yet the loop repeats it self again. whenever I think of this thoughts about loosing them appear. and more or less my other issues will come by as well. like attachment issues, trust issues etc. ... just why did I have to turn out like this? if everyone could just forget about me and myself included... would be nice.

It is like an endless loop of ups and downs. more recently it seems more consistent with the waves of emotion. like I feel good and all now, not stressed or anything just like I'm missing myself.
I've came to this conclusion after watching Bloom Into You, and especially the 12th ep. where Touko confesses to Yuu that she hates her true self so that is why she puts up her "perfect" Mio mask. Just to make Yuu fall in love with someone Touko loves. Her explanation was smart and I can relate to it to some degree cuz "you wouldn't truly love someone who love the person you truly hate..." -- Bloom Into You ep.12 - 17:00 --- your true self... it made me cry a little because it made me realize that the reason why I keep putting up masks for others to see. It feels wrong to say it but I truly do not know if I like myself and to some degree who even am I in the first place.
Like I know I'm not the type of a person to be a big shot or anything in the most scenarios I keep quiet and just observe and keep my distance just to be safe. And if that feeling of being safe disappears like it did this summer I just don't take it well. Fortunately Mates was there for me so I had someone to turn to. Thanks.
And that brings me to the point why I feel relieved when watching Yuri and that may be cuz I picture myself in position of one of the girls so not in a trans way but just being comforted by a female etc. exactly like Touko... it is all I just really want. My self confidence is still low and I fold so many times but I keep fighting for the feeling of safety and comfort I just feel like I need a little help from time to time and that feeling is... well... I don't even know how to explain it nor describe it... it is just whenever I was held I felt so safe and wanted.
to anyone who might ever read this it is 31st of August, a day before school starts and I feel like during this summer break I've lost a part of me that many loved and I hated. My own touch with myself. I wanna rebuild myself on who I truly am. And try to take pride in what I thought were weaknesses. It was just my pride not letting me be vulnerable, the small one, the less dominant one. There is nothing wrong with it really. Just who I am and there is no shame in it. It is still alright now I've talked to both Matthews about most of it and they do seem to stand my side witch I cannot be more happy because I do like both of them a lot and both of them do mean a lot to me. It is just that I need myself to find who I really am and I cannot bother any of them cuz I feel like this issue is one of many no one can solve for me. just how I don't know but I'll keep searching for it no matter what.

entries.title: why?
entries.content: he has done it yet again... zet again something started looking 'good' and he fucked it up again... I knew I shouldn't have came to that fuck ass party. I knew I should bitch out again... I did NOT and it has cost me a lot... like a FUCKING LOT... probably one of the MOST important person in my life even. why why why have I done it... and why don't I at least remember anything. I genuinely NEVER felt worse than now... all the stuff I've vented, all the stuff that I had to endure all the stuff that I had to go through were meaningless... all of that game I had to play carefully just for me to let my guard down ONCE to fuck up... like I don't know what to do anymore. I just want it all to end. Once and for all. I'll never be able to express how truly sorry I am for the pain, discomfort and misery that I must have cost by living, by existing in some ones presence. I just want to go and never show my face to anyone else. ever. all I had to do is not get pulled by my fucking mind in again. I was so close to getting better again but well I just had to force myself onto someone. I just had to cuz I did not apparently know better for some reason. I'll never forget what I've been told. I'll ne ver forget what have I done and most importantly I'll never be able to look him in the eye again at least the same way I've used to. I might as well tell that I predicted it... again did something that I've told myself that I would never do. and that is build my whole mental stability on some person. like I've said it multiple times "What if something happens between us and they will be gone" yeah Lori you know what the fuck just happened? Maybe exactly that you fag. You fucked up and now you are gonna enjoy the misery that it will bring you. just because Matt did it does NOT mean you can attempt that shit. Like what am I gonna do now at this point? I told my sorry and that's it. I cannot do anything more even tho I want to what I did is done and I'll never forget myself. it seems like every single year you fuck some shit up. just for the sake of it apparently. 2y ago was Niky, 1y ago was Vik and now it was Mates. Who next? Matt? like there is no one else I can loose at this point. if I ever loose him it will be the end of this boring ass book that I don't want to write anymore. I'm just tired of myself at this point. like it is so predictable at this point. one year one mental breakdown, one fumble and now I truly thought about well going again. after painful months that seemed that were getting better all just gone in a snap of a finger. everything I've worked so hard to build gone. My ego crushed, my confidence crushed, my self respect all of it gone. It seems like I've been telling the truth. I truly do hate myself at this point. Always my problems and my mind kills what I love, like and care for. it all comes down to this. like is there a cure for this or is it unfixable like it has always been broken so there might not be even a reason why to fix it. Like all of it comes down to the old quote I was spamming when I was 14 "comfort breeds weakness" I was getting comfortable and guess what happened? I got too ahead of myself if you can say there was myself in the function. I just felt safe I guess. I have a faint fragment where I was somewhere and I don't know where just next to him, I was idk if whispering or saying something along the lines of "id you weren't here I wouldn't be here" or "all of this I have is thanks to you" I just felt safe... too safe... so I decided to just send it I guess what I don't remember but I did. for what I'm sorry like I was never before. sorry for the discomfort... sorry for the burden that I am. sorry for everything wrong that I have done and you had to endure... sorry for ever meeting you. If I wasn't here your past few months would have been better.

it is not as bad as I thought. I saw him yesterday and today and he seems unbothered that I find really fortunate since I know I can rely on some one a little longer. to summarize the past few days it seems like a roller coaster of emotions for me. Tuesday I felt great and Wednesday was calm before the storm and prequel to the hell Thursday had in stock. Thursday was genuinely the worst day I had in a long time... just finding out I had forced a French kiss on Mates and he did not feel comfortable I felt like I should die once and for all. Thoughts about self harm were circling in my head like where and what but fortunately I gave up. Yet still the worry and pain I was in I don't ever want to feel that again. Friday rolled around and I was still off the same as the day before just misery and agony all combined. Saturday was a rollercoaster on it's own. morning feeling sick to the stomach from what I have done and worry of meeting Mates in person was terrible. At the end I have decided on going to his bday party and goodness gracious thanks that I have done it. it was at first weird to see some one I had "assaulted" if you can say it like that but later he kind of well kissed me on his own. I take that as a sort of a cute in my head get back for what I have done. It is not that I did not like it but it was just unexpected. To be fair neither of us are gay so I just get it as problem solved and nothing more nothing less. I was drunk as fuck when we both went to sleep and he blacked out so he probably does not remember that I was telling him one apology one after another and was holding him as close as he allowed me to. Amma confess I did kiss him a few times cuz I felt safe and a little silly and if I was a boy kisser that night once than why not drag it out as much as I can right? Now I am just confused as ever like I know what was stuck in my mind is over and I feel like a curse have been lifted of off me and I cannot feel more relieved for it. Like I truly like the guy in a friendly way... well... maybe a tiny bit more just cuz I got too attached to him via "trauma bonding" that was one sided as it could be but I do not mind it. Like I cannot imagine myself doing anything too spicy just I don't mind trying stuff like I don't mind the cuddles I in fact like them a lot. kisses please and that is the line for him so I wont ever cross that ever again on my own. now a few more stuff I can remember Milan knows a little of me as well due to my incident that I remember by fragments in the underground metro. I feel a little better honestly since I feel understood more and also it is a progress in my still existing trust issues. I did tell him the surface stuff and nothing more than that but still I've shown my vulnerable side and I feel good for once. That share came at a price that I got the the same dump if you can call it like that as well from Anton. He told me a LOT of stuff about him and I feel so bad for him yet I don't know how to help him in his situation. I did what I'd wish was done in the first place and just tried to sooth his fragile soul for at least the night and it thankfully worked but I don't know for how long. I think about telling Mates to check up on him a little by little but I don't know when will there be an oportunity for it really or if I will tell Milan to check up on him and crack his shell cuz I don't want for him to happen the same that happened to me not that long ago. If I had to tell one thing after the whole week it will be that I am so thankful for every one here... Milan, Peter and especially and that will be unexpected... Mates - just him being him and not acting all perfect and being so forgiving just gives me so much hope in humanity again. really... THANKS A LOT FOR EVERYTHING.

after yesterday and today I really do not know how to feel. It seems like I'm just a ghost to Mates at this point. This weekend hangout... Sent the message 4 days ago... got seen. like do NOT tell me you cannot respond. well you can. to Amy... not to me. Like I do get his standing like he probably wants a free weekend after seeing me basically last weekend but still... and also I feel like... well... hated to some sort. just the look in hes eyes seems so fake I cannot stand it even to he means so much. it is like something broke in me just like seems strange. it is like I don't care for him while I do more than anyone. like for example yesterday when we were at metro B4 school me and Peter were talking until Mates showed up. Took over the convo that we were having, told something about Amy and than was glued to his phone and Peter was saying nonsense. That day I did not wanna see him again. Unfortunately or fortunately we were at the theater and it was a 3 hour show. after the first half and after the break there happened some "romantic: shit and than my touch starvation kicked and I just wanted to hold his hand so much... I did not let myself to say, hint or even do anything cuz for some reason I did feel like it is not right. but the feeling is new to me. I started to feel that way after some deep thought after the Bday party. I did try to find why I feel that way and only slightly logical reason is that it is just what normal friends do not do that stuff. like I want to feel physical connection do not get me wrong but at that time it jus felt like there was something so repulsive. like the thought of me being so comfy to do what I did. even after I literally accepted my mistake. it just feels weird. and today was practically the same as before like the same start to the day. Met with Peter in the metro, than Mates showed up and again got hit with the Amy and it just broke me. like I do have nothing to say about his stuff and relationships but I just think from my perspective he is just lost in her. like for example from what he has told me was: yesterday he was up till midnight and went to sleep. got an IG notification and just got up even though he has put his phone down and while he was so close to sleep like just for the little dopamine hit for the chance of him seeing a DM from her. Like I do get it if you "love" someone you'd do anything for them and all it is just that he says he is not that desperate and does not care. like his actions tell the exact opposite. it just kills me to see how he does this to himself bit by bit. yes it might be fun and all and I do want the best for him but it just feels off to me. I might just be a total jealous void at this point. well I am. I find myself just craving physical touch, connection and affirmation... he gave that to me. and now when I see him purposefully pulling away just to get space I get anxious he might do what I feared the most. what I did not want to happen. what I told him about. just him leaving me. and really I do feel like it is coming just from the way he's been acting lately. yes I do act the same way but it just kills me to do it since well I do miss our times where we both had nothing going and there was just now. I do miss it and I do want to have it back. it is just I don't know how to bring my issue to light. if I say it like this it feels selfish and just blatantly wrong. these are just my thoughts and nothing more nothing less. it feels like I've been getting better since I had SOMEONE who I could go to, someone who'd be unbothered by any of my issues it is just I feel like I always had to force it in my opinion. just the feeling about the fact that NOONE ever asked how I felt when I looked off, the fact that no one ever even tried to talk things out with me when I was acting weird, the fact I'm a ghost to them now... makes me feel like no one really cared about me... like is it a problem in me? am I just too much to handle? am I too much of a burden to bare? if anyone just knew the feelings I've been going through... I feel like everyone know the feeling... everyone knows how they'd like people to act to them in my situation... yet they don't. it just feels like the hope that I had, the trust I've managed to build up from nothing, all the positive energy just fell apart like house made of cards. hope that people wouldn't change because on me being me, trust that managed to build with people shattered due to me playing games with people again and the positive energy gone cuz I got it all from external validation and feeling safe with people close to me. just I feel like past few days were so up and down. I try to act affectionate towards Mates yet he does not return anything so when he does something I shut him down out of instinct. this results in just cold acting towards each other and it bothers me like hell. I wanted to make up with him this weekend and it just did not go as I have planned. it is just sad how his priorities work. he knows way too well how much I like him being kind, him giving me attention and safe space. and still decides to put some 'random' girl to his top spots and just stops any thing that I try.

it happened again. like usual there was a long era of being all joyful and happy but it crashed al together and resulted in a breakdown and a panic attack in a middle of the night. "I want to be there for you"... it was the first lie he has told me that I naively believed. I was so lost I wanted someone... anyone who'd help me just a little. all that happened was me opening myself up way too much... result? I don't know how to tell. Is it hate? Fear? Disgust? may be all of those combined. I just can't stand someone with fake smile and force him to spend time with me just for my own sake. it is against all I stand and it is sad. I just want to go back in time and undo ALL I did. last night I ended up in a spiral of suicidal thoughts and my mind pinpointing every single mistake I did. I never felt more scared then that day. never EVER i thought I'd come back to that feeling and it came just because I had my expectations and hopes up. I just don't want to see them again. at least for a while. Now I have to be fake as always was just so not a single piece of my soul will escape. I don't want people to see me in the light I see myself in. There is nothing much left... all I have really now is Matt that I can go back I just fear that the same thing will happen again. Now it is kind of funny because I HAVE said it that this will be my fate and guess what had happened. I just don't know what to do anymore since I fear of being left alone again in the dark with just my thoughts. my habit of clinging to people got me again and. Will it be just me alone forever? I do not want people leaving me anymore. It got better and now my fears are even greater than they were before. I started thinking about approaching ppl again. I started do believe that I could be loved. I started to feel like me again. Now there is nothing left anymore. Not my hopes, dreams, ego, and even me. All I have left is this fuckass note that I spill my heart into and nothing more. If I just could do something. ANYTHING. Just to undo what cannot be undone. It broke my trust in people yet again. I just do not want to feel that way but it is like I'm drowning so deep in myself I'm starting to loose all hope at this point. Just how delusional have I been lately? I don't really know all I get is that quite a lot. I almost thought I've broke out of the loop of endless on and off happiness and straight up agony. what was I even thinking? why was I believing in anyone else than me. It just seems as if I got too numb and lost my sense of self preservation. I've let my guard down a few times and got a huge ass payout at the end. Got paid in mental scars that will take a long ass time to heal or even close if they ever do. how clueless was I when I thought that this is the correct route. now when I look back at it I chose the desperate choice and it made it not a single bit better. if anything it is way worse now. All I do now is drown out emotions in music. I make myself seem as if all was ok and all since I don't want people to get involved.
